name: RMW - Barrett M82
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - No wonder Zakhaev was pissed. Getting shot with a sniper rifle chambered in .50 BMG is one way to ruin one's day. Designed to destroy enemy equipment, vehicles, and anything that moves. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
